request.prompt:
Determine whether Red Velvet has any publicly announced events after 2026-07-15 (concerts, tours, or fan meetings). Search for this artist only; do not bundle another artist.

Strict evidence rules: accept only an official artist/company source, promoter, venue, ticketing source, or reliable media. Exclude kpopofficial.com and all other event aggregators as evidence. Do not guess. A general tour announcement without a dated stop is not an event. If no qualifying public event is found, return NO_EVENTS_FOUND.

For every event you claim, the artist must match and you must provide the complete exact date or date range, venue, city/country, and a structured web-search citation with URL, title, and cited text that directly supports that same event. Do not claim an event without a citation.

Return only these fields in this order:
VERDICT: EVENTS_FOUND | NO_EVENTS_FOUND
EVENT_COUNT: <n>
EVENTS:
- ARTIST: ...
  DATES: ...
  VENUE: ...
  CITY_COUNTRY: ...
  SOURCE_CLASS: official_artist_company | promoter | venue | ticketing | reliable_media
  CITATION_URL: ...
  CITED_TEXT: ...
REASON: one short factual sentence

citations.title: Girl group Red Velvet to return with new album, fan concert in August
citations.cited_text: Girl group Red Velvet will return with a new album and a fan concert in August, its agency SM Entertainment announced on Monday.

citations.title: Girl group Red Velvet to return with new album, fan concert in August
citations.cited_text: The fan concert will take place at the Tiger Dome gymnasium at Korea University in northern Seoul at 6 p.m. on Aug. 1 and at 4 p.m. on Aug. 2.

stage2.text:
The Korea JoongAng Daily article (a reliable media source) is highly relevant. It confirms a Red Velvet fan concert in Seoul in August 2026, but specifies the venue as **Korea University's Tiger Dome gymnasium** on **August 1 and 2**, not Olympic Hall on August 15. No source confirms a Red Velvet event at Olympic Hall on August 15, 2026. The Wikipedia Olympic Hall page lists events at that venue around that period but does not mention Red Velvet on August 15.

---

VERDICT: CONTRADICTED
ARTIST_MATCH: true
DATE_MATCH: false
VENUE_OR_CITY_MATCH: false
MATCHED_DATES: none
SOURCE_QUALITY: reliable_media
SOURCE_URLS: https://www.koreajoongangdaily.com/entertainment/girl-group-red-velvet-to-return-with-new-album-fan-concert-in-august/12723807
REASON: 
SM Entertainment announced Red Velvet's 2026 fan concert in Seoul, but it is scheduled at the Tiger Dome gymnasium at Korea University on August 1 and 2
 — not at Olympic Hall on August 15, directly contradicting the claimed date and venue.
